..notes: Can mutate current shell and run arbitrary code.

add-content.notes: Case-insensitive on PowerShell/cmd where applicable; inspect arguments.

aider.notes: Can read/write/execute tools and access network; inspect its tool-permission flags.

alias.notes: Display-only usage is read; assignments are write. setx persists user/system env on Windows.

bun.notes: Lifecycle scripts may execute arbitrary code.
